values.name: send
values.comment:
Utility for working with rails. Wraps Http.send passing an Authenticity Token
along with the type of request and a way to decode results.
values.type: String -> Decoder value -> String -> String -> Body -> Task Error value

values.name: errors
values.comment:
Function for creating a Decoder that decodes errors formatted by rails. It is
expecting JSON formatted as:

`{ errors: {errorName: ["Error String"] } }`.

To create the decoder, pass a dict mapping your Strings to Fields that mimic
the expected nesting, eg.

```
mappings =
    Dict.fromList
        [ ( "school", School )
        , ( "school.name", SchoolName )
        , ( "school.address", SchoolAddress )
        , ( "school.city", City )
        , ( "school.state", State )
        , ( "school.zip", Zip )
        , ( "school.country", Country )
        ]

railsErrorsDecoder =
    Rails.Decode.errors mappings
```
values.type: Dict String field -> Decoder (List ( field, String ))
